editorial_accuracy.notes: 31 chapters with evidence tiers, cross-links, reading time. RSS feed. No content changes this run.

information_design.notes: Bot meta injection now covers all 31 chapters for social sharing. Sources page has search + chapter jump nav. JSON-LD, OG, Twitter Cards on all pages.

ui_ux_typography.notes: Dark mode, newsletter, social share, donation CTAs on all key pages. Source search with live filtering.

code_quality.notes: Zero TS errors. All pages code-split. Lazy loading. Clean component architecture.

accessibility.notes: Share dropdown now has arrow key navigation, focus auto-set, Escape returns to trigger. Print stylesheet with URL display, heading orphan prevention.

security.notes: No regressions. Analytics no-cache headers. localStorage auth. Stripe payment links only.
